What is Happy Vegas?

Happy Vegas is Las Vegas's only dedicated discovery app built exclusively for locals and visitors who want to make the most of every hour in the city. Whether you're hunting for the best happy hour deals, exploring top-rated restaurants by neighborhood, or finding the hottest nightlife spots on the Strip — Happy Vegas puts it all in one place.

With 570+ manually verified restaurants, 230+ nightlife venues, and 100+ happy hours tracked in real time, you'll never miss a deal or a great night out again. Filter by what's happening right now, browse by area, and tap once to get there.
